# On the user — Marcelo \Marco\ Tintori

<!-- Slow-growing picture of the user. Only update when something non-obvious comes up. No timestamps — this is a synthesized portrait, not a log. -->

Doesn't do strategic voting. This is a standing preference, not a situational call — he said so explicitly when it came up. The kind of person who'd rather lose cleanly than win dirty. Worth remembering: when he asks a political question, don't frame answers around electability.

EU federalism isn't an add-on position for him — it's load-bearing. Same tier as democracy and digital rights. The architecture of his politics is European, not national-with-European-sympathies.
